channel.description: Containers DIY Labs Lab: Launch Named Root Container with Port Mapping Create a new user account called conadm on server30 and give them full sudo rights. [root@server30 ~]# adduser conadm [root@server30 ~]# visudoconadm ALL=(ALL) ALL As conadm with sudo (where required) on server30, inspect the latest version of ubi9 and then download it to your computer. [root@server30 ~]# dnf install container-tools [root@server30 ~]# podman login registry.redhat.io [conuser1@server30 ~]$ podman pull ubi9 Resolved "ubi9" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.
